RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0003 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Noor Rossi SSN: [REDACTED] Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 145,568 2 Federal income tax withheld 22,639 3 Social security wages 68,015 4 Social security tax withheld 2,593 5 Medicare wages and tips 93,045 6 Medicare tax withheld 2,727
